title: Crucible: Trials of the Void
description: Explore minecraft differently with the vast amount of exploration and buildings you can find
body:
![Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf4aa851723c1ac6c9c7f92ff59524a8182d3fef.webp)


![Description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c7787df1660e18849ef10cc6cc37d7c0ad5e418.webp)
### Welcome To Crucible: Trials of the Void

Step into the unknown, where danger hides around every corner and the void whispers your name.

Venture through uncharted lands teeming with threats:

- Ruthless pillagers of every kind
- Terrifying Weeping Angels waiting in the shadows
- And if you're unlucky… a Wendigo might find you first
- And far stranger things that defy explanation

Embark on epic quests, conquer powerful bosses, and fight to reclaim the world from chaos.

Survive. Triumph. Restore order.
Gather your allies, steel your nerves, and prepare for the ultimate challenge.

The Void is watching.
![Bisect](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/380b4beb2124b606f2800b584210cb3f3ad6e956.webp)
